preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps contra St. Louis City: 'Muller mejora a todos', dice Sabbi
preReview.description: Los Vancouver Whitecaps buscarán volver a la senda de la victoria cuando reciban al St. Louis City, que está en dificultades, este fin de semana.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps v St. Louis City: 'Muller makes everyone better', says Sabbi
preReview.description: The Vancouver Whitecaps will be looking to get back in the win column when they host struggling St. Louis City this weekend.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps contro St. Louis City: 'Muller rende tutti migliori', dice Sabbi
preReview.description: I Vancouver Whitecaps cercheranno di tornare alla vittoria quando ospiteranno i St. Louis City in difficoltà questo weekend.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps x St. Louis City: 'Muller melhora todos', diz Sabbi
preReview.description: O Vancouver Whitecaps estará buscando voltar a vencer quando receber o St. Louis City em dificuldades neste fim de semana.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps contre St. Louis City : 'Muller rend tout le monde meilleur', déclare Sabbi
preReview.description: Les Vancouver Whitecaps chercheront à retrouver le chemin de la victoire lorsqu'ils accueilleront le St. Louis City en difficulté ce week-end.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps gegen St. Louis City: 'Müller macht alle besser', sagt Sabbi
preReview.description: Die Vancouver Whitecaps werden versuchen, wieder in die Gewinnspur zu kommen, wenn sie dieses Wochenende das kämpfende St. Louis City empfangen.

preReview.title: فانكوفر وايتكابس ضد سانت لويس سيتي: 'مولر يجعل الجميع أفضل'، يقول سابي
preReview.description: سيبحث فانكوفر وايتكابس عن العودة إلى الفوز عندما يستضيفون سانت لويس سيتي المتعثر هذا الأسبوع.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps x St. Louis City: 'Muller melhora todos', diz Sabbi
preReview.description: O Vancouver Whitecaps estará buscando voltar à coluna das vitórias quando receberem o St. Louis City em dificuldades neste fim de semana.

QAData.question: Who won between Vancouver Whitecaps and St. Louis City on Sun, 24 Aug 2025 01:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Vancouver Whitecaps won 3–2 over St. Louis City on Sun, 24 Aug 2025 01:30:00 GMT.
